answer: You can upload your marksheet in the Documents section. Go to Documents from the sidebar and click 'Upload' next to 'Marksheet'.
Upload your Income Certificate in the Documents section. It is required for most scholarships.
You can upload your Caste Certificate in the Documents section. This is required for SC/ST/OBC category scholarships.
To apply for a scholarship, go to the Scholarships page, find a scholarship you are eligible for, and click 'Apply Now'. Fill in the form and submit.
Complete your profile by going to the Profile section. Fill in your personal details, academic records, and upload required documents.
Use the Resume Builder to create your resume. You can add Academic Details and Career Details, and use 'Auto-Fill from Profile' to populate fields automatically.
You can check your eligibility for any scholarship on the Scholarships page. Each scholarship card shows an eligibility badge. Click on a scholarship for detailed eligibility information.
The Skill Gap Analysis widget on your Dashboard shows which skills you have and which are required for your matched scholarships.
All your documents can be managed in the Documents section. You can upload, view, and replace documents there.
You can view all your scholarship applications and their current status in the 'My Applications' section.
Use the 'Auto-Fill from Profile' button on the scholarship application form or Resume Builder to automatically populate fields from your stored profile data.
Upload your Aadhaar Card in the Documents section as identity proof.
Each scholarship has a deadline shown on its card. Check the Scholarships page for upcoming deadlines.
Click the 'Login' button and authenticate using Internet Identity. It is secure and decentralized.
Visit our Help page for frequently asked questions and guidance on using the platform.
